originalTitle: [4K] XBOX Games Showcase 2026 | Gears of War: E-Day Direct
content: American Sign Language: https://youtube.com/live/macPbXej0a0 British Sign Language: https://youtube.com/live/tYGKZsFGQzA Audio Descriptions: https://youtube.com/live/EPJcQA2eUbo Join us for our double feature on June 7, 10am PT - XBOX Games Showcase immediately followed by Gears of War: E-Day Direct. It's our 25th anniversary and we're excited to share upcoming games from our first party studios as well as partners from around the globe. Stay tuned immediately following the Showcase for the Gears of War: E-Day Direct and join The Coalition for a deeper look into the upcoming origin story in the critically acclaimed series.
chineseContent: 美国手语：https://youtube.com/live/macPbXej0a0 英国手语：https://youtube.com/live/tYGKZsFGQzA 音频说明：https://youtube.com/live/EPJcQA2eUbo 加入我们，观看太平洋时间 6 月 7 日上午 10 点的双重专题 - XBOX 游戏展示会，紧接着是《战争机器：E-Day Direct》。今年是我们成立 25 周年，我们很高兴与大家分享我们的第一方工作室以及来自世界各地的合作伙伴即将推出的游戏。请立即关注《战争机器展示：E-Day Direct》，并加入联盟，深入了解这个广受好评的系列即将推出的起源故事。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
